channel.title: Global Sanctions News (Custom RSS)
channel.description: Auto-generated feed from rendered Global Sanctions news list

item.title: EU issues statement on 3rd country alignment with Moldova sanctions
item.description: The EU has issued a statement confirming the alignment of certain 3rd countries with Decision (CFSP) 2026/1357. The Decision added 6 people to the EU’s Moldova sanctions list (Regulation (EU) 2023/888

item.title: EU Commission report on implementation of EU Dual-Use Regulation
item.description: The European Commission has published a report on Member State implementation of the EU Dual-Use Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2021/821) in 2024. The regulation was adopted in 2021. It requires the i

item.title: US adds Rwandan gold refinery & minerals trading network to DRC sanctions list
item.description: The US has added 2 people and 4 entities to its DRC sanctions list. They are said to be working with the UN-sanctioned March 23 Movement (M23) to export conflict minerals illegally to Rwanda from the

item.title: US issues Venezuela general license for earthquake relief until October
item.description: The US has issued General License No. 60 to authorise transactions related to relief efforts in Venezuela, following the earthquake on 24 June. The license approves transactions that would otherwis

item.title: EU renews Reg 833 sanctions on Russia for a year, until 2027
item.description: The EU has renewed its Regulation 833 sanctions on Russia 31 July 2027, under Decision 2014/512/CFSP – Press Release. The sanctions were imposed in 2014 and were last extended on 30 June 2025. The

item.title: UK updates basis for Mikhail Fridman designation
item.description: The UK has amended its statement of reasons for listing Mikhail Fridman under the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019. Mr Fridman was UK-sanctioned in 2022 for being a director of the Alfa G

item.title: Financial Action Task Force updates recommendations on terrorism sanctions
item.description: The FATF has updated Recommendation 6 of its Standards on targeted financial sanctions related to terrorism and terrorist financing – press release. Recommendation 6 requires countries to freeze th

item.title: UK issues dual-use goods open general export licence
item.description: The UK has issued a new open general export licence for listed dual-use goods. The OGEL is a consolidation of the EU member states Dual-Use OGEL and the General Export Authorisation GEA001. Exporte

item.title: US removes 7 people, 2 companies and 2 vessels from Russia sanctions list
item.description: The US has removed 7 Russian people, 2 Turkish companies and 2 vessels from its EO 14024 Russia sanctions list. Those delisted are: Ivan Potanin, son of Vladimir Potanin (who remains sanctioned).

item.title: US-sanctioned ICC judges bring claim challenging designation
item.description: 3 judges of the International Criminal Court have filed a claim against the US, challenging the basis of their designation under the EO 14203 International Criminal Court sanctions regime – press rele
